title: Peony Artificial Silk Flowers 2 Bunches Burgundy Fake Flower Bouquet for Wedding Arrangement Home Kitchen Table Party Decor
features: SIZE: The height of the bouquet is 30cm with 6 branches, mainly consisting of 1 rose with a diameter of 7cm, 3 peonies with a diameter of 4.5cm, and 2 bunches of hydrangeas with a diameter of 7cm.

MATERIAL: The flowers and leaves are made of high quality silk material, which looks very realistic. The wire is externally wrapped in plastic to make branches, the branches can be bent and trimmed at will.
EASY CARE: The artificial bouquet doesn't need sunlight and water, it can stay fresh all the time. Just need to wipe the dust on it regularly with a damp cloth.
BEAUTIFUL DECORATION: It can be used in various scenes such as living room, kitchen, bedroom, garden, party, hotel, etc., adding romantic and elegant atmosphere to your home.
IDEAL GIFT: No one will not like flowers. On Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Christmas and other anniversaries, our simulated flowers are ideal for giving gifts to your loved ones.
description: Product Description More Details Rose Peony 6 Branches Bendable HNVNER Artificial Flowers Size: 30cm / 11.8in A HNVNER mixed bouquet includes 1 rose, 3 peonies and 2 hydrangeas. Bright colours that look like the real thing and a wide range of colours for you to choose from. Can help your home look more vibrant! Make Your Life More Colourful
